description_long: This hot dog features a soft, golden-brown bun that is slightly split to reveal a filling of various ingredients. The most prominent topping is a thick slice of hard-boiled egg, centrally placed along the length of the bun. Visible beneath and around the egg are strands of mayonnaise, a strip of carrot, and what appears to be a savory meat or sausage filling, partially obscured by the bun and condiments. There are also hints of green, likely lettuce or another vegetable, peeking out from one end. The bun appears fluffy and lightly textured, with a slightly glossy finish from the condiments. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a street food hot dog, with a mix of colors and textures that suggest freshness and variety.
description: A golden-brown bun filled with sausage, a slice of hard-boiled egg, mayonnaise, carrot, and green vegetables, creating a colorful and appetizing hot dog.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bun, the egg slice, and a clear layer of condiments and fillings.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the circular egg slice, visible sausage, and green vegetable at the forefront.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the egg slice and carrot strip more visible, bun texture and fillings clearly shown.
description_view_3: End view with the carrot strip and egg slice most prominent, bun seam visible.
